# vibe-todo Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-04-23

## Active Technologies
- Browser `localStorage` (existing) — extend `Todo` type to include `createdAt` timestamp; reorder array persisted under key `vibe-todo:todos` (002-ux-improvement)

- TypeScript 5.x (mandatory per constitution) + Vue 3, Nuxt.js 3, Vite (via Nuxt), Tailwind CSS (001-todo-app-mvp)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test && npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript 5.x (mandatory per constitution): Follow standard conventions
